# Addon adapter RBAC

<!-- Generated by internal/adapter/rbacgen. DO NOT EDIT. Regenerate with `go -C tools tool task gen:addon-rbac`. -->

Fathom runs each addon adapter under its **own least-privilege ServiceAccount**.
At reconcile time the operator builds a client that *impersonates* the addon's
ServiceAccount and hands it to the adapter, so an adapter can read exactly — and
only — what it declares below. The operator ServiceAccount itself holds **no
addon read permissions**; it holds only `impersonate` on these
per-addon ServiceAccounts (see [Operator impersonation grant](#operator-impersonation-grant)).

Each adapter declares its grants in Go (`adapter.RBACDeclarer`); this
page and the manifests under `config/rbac/addons/` are generated from
those declarations. Every verb is read-only (`get`/`list`/`watch`)
unless a **Write reason** justifies it — the read-only CI guard fails any
unjustified write.

## cert-manager

ServiceAccount: `fathom-addon-cert-manager` (namespace `fathom-system`)

| API group | Resources | Verbs | Write reason |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| apps | deployments | get, list, watch | — |
| core | pods, services | get, list, watch | — |
| admissionregistration.k8s.io | mutatingwebhookconfigurations, validatingwebhookconfigurations | get, list, watch | — |
| apiextensions.k8s.io | customresourcedefinitions | get, list, watch | — |
| cert-manager.io | certificates, clusterissuers, issuers | get, list, watch | — |
| cert-manager.io | certificates, issuers | create | admission dry-run probe (create with DryRunAll) exercises the webhook path without persisting |

## cilium

ServiceAccount: `fathom-addon-cilium` (namespace `fathom-system`)

| API group | Resources | Verbs | Write reason |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| apps | deployments, daemonsets | get, list, watch | — |
| core | pods | get, list, watch | — |
| apiextensions.k8s.io | customresourcedefinitions | get, list, watch | — |

## coredns

ServiceAccount: `fathom-addon-coredns` (namespace `fathom-system`)

| API group | Resources | Verbs | Write reason |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| apps | deployments | get, list, watch | — |
| core | pods, services | get, list, watch | — |
| core | pods | create, delete | launch and tear down the single-shot DNS probe pod per check (ADR-0003) |
| discovery.k8s.io | endpointslices | get, list, watch | — |

## external-secrets

ServiceAccount: `fathom-addon-external-secrets` (namespace `fathom-system`)

| API group | Resources | Verbs | Write reason |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| apps | deployments | get, list, watch | — |
| core | pods | get, list, watch | — |
| apiextensions.k8s.io | customresourcedefinitions | get, list, watch | — |
| external-secrets.io | externalsecrets | get, list, watch | — |

## Operator impersonation grant

The operator ServiceAccount (`fathom-controller-manager`) holds only `impersonate` on the per-addon ServiceAccounts above, via the namespaced Role `fathom-addon-impersonator` in `fathom-system`. It carries no addon read permissions of its own, so each addon's blast radius is exactly its declared rules.
